<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelRay\Watchers; use Illuminate\Log\Events\MessageLogged; use Illuminate\Support\Str; use Spatie\Ray\Settings\Settings; class DeprecatedNoticeWatcher extends Watcher { public function register(): void { // } public function concernsDeprecatedNotice(MessageLogged $messageLogged): bool { $settings = app(Settings::class); $this->enabled = $settings->send_deprecated_notices_to_ray; if ($this->enabled()) { return false; } return Str::contains($messageLogged->message, ['deprecated', 'Deprecated', '[\ReturnTypeWillChange]']); } }
